name: Beef with Caper Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Beef Eye Of Round Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oil, tomato paste, soy sauce, vinegar, rosemary, salt and pepper.
2. Pour the mixture over the roast and cover; marinate in the refrigerator for 2 hours or overnight.
3. Remove the roast from the marinade and wipe with absorbent paper.
4. Place the roast, fat side up, on a rack in an open roasting pan.
5. Roast in a moderate oven (350 degrees F.) for 18 to 20 minutes per pound or until it reaches an internal temperature of 150 degrees F. for medium-rare.
6. Chill the roast and slice.
7. Arrange slices of cold roast beef in an overlapping pattern on a serving platter.
8. Spoon caper sauce down the center.
9. Sprinkle with paprika and garnish with tomato roses, green onions and parsley.
10. Serve with rye bread.
